anchor_evidence: known real class sample day = YYYY-MM-DD

expected_changes.summary: Create one verified schedule event after anchor confirmation.

notes: 0교시=08:00 and each period increments by exactly one hour unless the source says otherwise.
Do not dedupe by date + title alone.
Adjacent same-title periods on the same date must merge into one continuous event.
Non-adjacent same-title periods must remain separate events.
Read-back verifies every expected minute key after merge.
